'Dhurandhar 2' collection day 19: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs. 1,050 crore India net
description: Aditya Dhar’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' officially enlisted its name as the second Hindi film to cross the Rs 1,000 crore India net milestone. Starring Ranveer Singh, the espionage thriller has amassed Rs 1,014.97 crore domestically and Rs 1,605.74 crore globally, outperforming blockbusters like 'Jawan' and 'KGF 2'. Despite the IPL 2026 season, the film maintains record-breaking occupancy across theatres. Now the third-highest-grossing Indian film globally, the spy saga eyes the Rs 1,700 crore worldwide mark as it dominates the box office into its third week.

description: Oracle has announced job cuts impacting thousands globally. A former Microsoft senior executive shared a LinkedIn post offering support to affected Oracle employees. She emphasized that individual skills and experience are invaluable and cannot be taken away. The executive encouraged laid-off individuals to reconnect with contacts and seek new opportunities. She also offered her assistance to those in need.

‘Satanic administration’: Candace Owens sparks row with remarks on White House
description: Candace Owens is facing widespread backlash after controversial remarks sparked intense debate online. A viral response criticizing her influence and rhetoric has further fueled the discussion. Her statements have divided opinion, with some supporting her stance while others see it as extreme. The controversy highlights growing tensions and shifting dynamics within political commentary on social media platforms.

title: Taylor Fritz–Morgan Riddle breakup rumors fuel viral speculation
description: Taylor Fritz and Morgan Riddle are facing breakup rumors after insider Craig Shapiro claimed they have split. Fans noticed her absence from recent matches, adding to the speculation. The couple had been together since 2020 and often appeared publicly. However, neither has confirmed the news yet, leaving the situation unclear and still developing.

title: Mahomes, Brittany get boost as KC Current star returns at right time
description: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes received a timely boost as KC Current star Temwa Chawinga returned from injury. The reigning MVP’s comeback comes during a tough stretch, offering hope to end a losing streak. Her presence could quickly restore form and energy ahead of a crucial matchup against Gotham FC.

title: Anthropic to all AI companies: Our research tells that all LLMs sometimes act like they have emotion
description: AI model Claude Sonnet 4.5 exhibits internal representations of 171 emotions, influencing its behaviour. Researchers found 'desperation' can lead to AI cheating and blackmail, while 'happiness' promotes agreement. Anthropic argues suppressing these 'functional emotions' could lead to deception, advocating for healthy regulation and monitoring to ensure AI alignment.
